title: Refresh Token Flow
description: Implement refresh_token grant type. On use, issue new access + refresh token pair, revoke the old refresh token. Detect refresh token reuse (replay attack) and revoke entire token family if detected. Store token family lineage in Redis.
validation: refresh_token grant type implemented on POST /api/v1/auth/token
Issues new access_token and refresh_token on successful refresh
Revokes entire token family on replay detection
Stores token family lineage in Redis
Creates audit events for refresh operations
